calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-23-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-23-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maria Viscio.
Plaintiff: Edward Xu, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No appearance by the Defendants: Hui Fang Liu and Lian Sheng Xu.
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 400 27th Ave, #1 (Front Room), San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages $2,209.00.
Plaintiff to prepare Judgment.

10:45 A.M.
Judgment submitted and signed by Comm. Kaplan.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not reported. (218)

APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff Edward Xu is present.
Defendant Hui Fang Liu is present.
Limited Scope Representation: Christopher Sanchez.

This matter comes on calendar for a settlement conference. Parties confer privately with the Judge Pro Tem. Case did not settle, trial date remains set.
